title: mentha × dumetorum var. lugosiensis
intro: Mentha × dumetorum var. lugosiensis, also known as Hungarian mint, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the mint plant, classified as a hybrid of Mentha dumetorum and Mentha lugosi. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant, making it useful in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of Mentha × dumetorum var. lugosiensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate congestion, and soothe digestive issues, as well as its antioxidant properties that may help protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
